name: gemdex
description: A global, persistent memory layer for AI coding agents. Ships the gemdex MCP server (save_memory, recall, update_memory) backed by Gemini embeddings + embedded LanceDB, and a skill that nudges the agent to save/recall/update only when explicitly told. Memories are one global pool, shared across every repo and session. No Docker required.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

lancedb_path.title: LanceDB path (optional)
lancedb_path.description: Filesystem path for the embedded memory store. Defaults to ~/.gemdex/lance if left blank.
